windom documentation

2.0.1

This is the documentation of WinDom, a high level GEM library.
This documentation contains:
Global presentation of windom
Installation of windom (and how to rebuild it)
Usage of windom
Reference documentation
Tutorial (to introduce windom programming)
Extended OBJECT types of windom
External UserDef library (LDG) API
Configuration of windom
some notes to migrate your windom1 application to windom2
LGPL copyright notice, applicable to windom
ChangeLog generated by cvs2cl.pl (History of windom1)
Authors:
Arnaud Bercegeay
Stanislav Opichal
Dominique Béréziat
Web site:
http://windom.sf.net
